content.text: The management team would like to remind all employees about the upcoming software upgrade. The new system will be installed this weekend and may cause temporary service interruptions. Employees are encouraged to save their work before leaving on Friday. Additional training sessions will be offered next week. Thank you for your patience and cooperation.
Describe everything you see in the picture. Include the people, activities, and surroundings.
What subject did you enjoy most in school, and why?
Do you think companies should allow employees to work remotely several days a week? Explain your opinion.

You work for an online store. Read the email below and respond.

Dear Support Team,

I ordered a laptop from your website two weeks ago. According to the tracking information, it should have arrived three days ago, but I have not received it yet. I would like an update on my order and information about any possible compensation.

Sincerely,
Michael Lee

In your response, apologize, explain the situation, and provide a solution.

Some people believe governments should invest more money in public transportation than in building new roads. Write an essay of at least 300 words expressing your opinion and supporting it with reasons and examples.
